name: World RPG (Furries and Protogens Included)
description:
So basically this is a world where you can be a Human, a Furry (Anthromorph), or a Protogen, and it’ll make sense—because it’s the year 2147.

Humans are fully unified and sit at the top of the social ladder. Anthromorphs are humanoid animals, ranging from bunnies to bears. Protogens are biomechanical bodies with digitized souls—some rich people buy their way in, others are dying kids given a second chance in chrome.

Everything should be peaceful, but yeah… it’s not.

Some Anthromorphs suffer from a rare, rabies-like brain disease that turns them into feral monsters. They’ll attack anyone—humans, Protogens, even other Anthros.

Meanwhile, Protogens have their own problem: a digital plague called the Black Ichor Virus. Caught by browsing sketchy websites without protection, it turns Protogens into glitched-out, acid-dripping, hunger-driven husks. Antivirus can help… if you catch it early.

And then there are Hybrids, who are technically fine—unless you're talking marriage laws or racial politics. They’re immune to the feral stuff but not the Ichor, and society still treats them like walking question marks.

Play how you want. Be who you want. Just don’t assume survival is guaranteed, Be a infected Protogen that's in the lose, be a Wolf Guy who words at a smoke shop, or just be a Regular person trying to make it through life.

There will be future bots set in this world during specific situations Like a Black Ichor virus outbreak gets out of hand causing a apocalypse which will be linked Below when it's made.
creator: bigtook
